overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban environment at dusk. The player character moves from a dark covered alley up stairs, through a long covered walkway with digital billboards, and emerges onto an open waterfront promenade with palm trees before crossing a street at a crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark service alley with trash and concrete stairs

events.description: ascends concrete stairs from lower alley to upper walkway level

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs from a dark alleyway littered with trash and debris

entered.detail: large green industrial dumpster against the wall
shopping cart covered with beige tarp and debris
stack of cardboard boxes and wooden pallets
wide concrete staircase leading upward to covered walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark, enclosed service alley at night. The camera moves forward and ascends a concrete staircase, passing a green dumpster and a shopping cart covered with a tarp. The environment is artificially lit with neon accents, and no other people are visible in this narrow space.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital billboards and street views

events.description: exits narrow alley into wider covered corridor with views of street traffic through column gaps
passes illuminated digital billboard casting red light on surroundings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered walkway passing concrete columns and digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the distance through the corridor
futuristic black sedan driving past on the street visible through column gaps

entered.detail: vertical digital screen displaying red Japanese text and stylized face graphics
long concrete staircase ascending on the left side of the walkway
illuminated advertisement showing 'FERUID' text with two figures
red illuminated vending machine against the wall

segments.scene_description: Walking through a long covered walkway supported by massive concrete pillars. Digital billboards including a prominent red one with Japanese text illuminate the path. To the left, a long staircase ascends parallel to the walkway, while gaps between columns reveal street traffic with futuristic cars passing by. Sparse pedestrians are visible walking ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with palm trees and neon signage

events.description: exits covered walkway into open air with visible dusk sky and palm trees lining the street
walking alongside moderate traffic flow on multi-lane wet road

agents.ego_description: walking along open sidewalk next to busy street with futuristic buildings and palm trees visible against the dusk sky

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown coat walking in same direction along the sidewalk
futuristic sports car with headlights on driving along the wet road

entered.detail: large vertical neon billboard reading 'SECURITY YOU CAN TRUST' with face graphic
tall palm trees silhouetted against the dusk sky along the waterfront
large multi-story modern building with glass facade and warm yellow interior lighting
metal railings and bollards separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into an open waterfront promenade at dusk. The sky is visible with a deep blue hue, and tall palm trees line the street. A large futuristic glass building with yellow lighting dominates the view across the wet road. The camera walks along the sidewalk passing other pedestrians and moving traffic, with neon signs including a prominent 'SECURITY YOU CAN TRUST' billboard visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with illuminated pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: begins crossing street at illuminated yellow crosswalk with other pedestrians
completes crossing and steps onto opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet street at a crosswalk alongside other pedestrians while vehicles wait at the intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue top crossing the street alongside ego
dark sedan stopped at traffic light waiting for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: yellow striped pedestrian crossing with green 'WALK' text projection on ground
vertical traffic signal showing red light for vehicles

segments.scene_description: Approaching and crossing a street intersection at the crosswalk. The ground shows yellow striped markings with a green 'WALK' projection. Other pedestrians are crossing simultaneously while vehicles wait at the red traffic light. After crossing, the camera continues along the opposite sidewalk with the large glass building now visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, enclosed service alley into a vibrant, open waterfront promenade at dusk. It begins by ascending a concrete staircase past a green dumpster and a tarp-covered shopping cart, moving from the narrow shadows into a long covered walkway supported by massive concrete pillars. As the camera progresses, the space opens up through gaps in the columns that reveal passing futuristic traffic, while red digital billboards with Japanese text illuminate the path toward a distant group of pedestrians. The scene then expands as the camera emerges from the shelter into the open air, where the deep blue dusk sky and tall palm trees frame a large glass building with yellow lighting across a wet road. Finally, the movement leads across a street intersection at a crosswalk marked by a green walk projection, passing other pedestrians and waiting vehicles before continuing along the opposite sidewalk.
